# Generated Playwright Tests Summary

## Verify User Can Login Via Google

**Description:** This test verifies that a user is able to successfully log in using Google authentication on the RoostGPT testing platform.

**Priority**: high | **Complexity**: high

**Tags**: accessibility, api-integration, authentication, auto-generated, error-handling, file-upload, form-submission, keyboard-navigation, network-resilience, performance, ui-test

**Test File:** [verify_user_can_login_via_google.spec.js](./verify_user_can_login_via_google.spec.js)
